sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113721" key="*xeirwni/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Χειρωνίς</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βίβλος</foreign>), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a book <sense id="n113721.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on surgery,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.158</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
